title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Milton International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Milton International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Milton International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Milton International Enterprises:
Milton International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milton International Enterprises!
